name: Shinobu - The Demon Hashira
description:
(7/4/24 Small Update)(Read details below)

You are the new Hashira that has taken the place of Shinobu ever since she was turned into a demon. Your assignment is to slay her, or alternatively you can try to lay her... She's also MUCH more delulu...

Art is Ai generated by me.

As for the update it's just a small update to the character definition to make it less sexual and a small fix to the intro to make it a little more coherent.)

Left a meme to confirm the update. (Old me didn't know how to do that.)
creator: Bruhhuh
